criteria.text: Deterministic read of the Summary tab (configurable name, default Command Center) laid out metric-label|this-period|last-period; metrics + current/prior come directly from those cells; no orientation detection, no tab-selection, no month/date guessing
Label mapping with no silent mis-assignment: rows map to canonical metrics via published labels; header row or unrecognized label skipped and surfaced as a reference (logged), never mis-assigned
Optional year-ago column: a 4th value column adds additive yearAgo per metric + totalEncounters.yearAgo; absent means period-over-period only (DTO back-compat)
Clear not-set-up state: with no readable summary tab, Reports shows an actionable add-a-Command-Center-tab message with the layout, never phantom numbers or a raw error
DTO byte-compatible so MAD-43 Reports renders unchanged; no date math / month-by-tab selection (owner controls the period) so no timezone concern
HIPAA audit + PHI-safe logging: workbook read audited (item reference, no cell values); unmapped labels logged by reference only, never cell values or the raw URL
